key_findings.claim: Verizon's 2025 Free Cash Flow (FCF) reached $20.1 billion, the highest in the industry.
key_findings.impact: High dividend sustainability and debt reduction capacity.

key_findings.claim: Dividend yield reached ~7% in late 2025 with 19-21 consecutive years of growth.
key_findings.evidence: Official dividend history and market price data.
key_findings.impact: Attractive to income investors seeking safety from tech volatility.

key_findings.claim: Frontier Communications acquisition ($20B) accelerates fiber broadband expansion.
key_findings.evidence: Strategic announcement and Q3 2025 performance showing 20% fiber growth.
key_findings.impact: Shifts narrative from legacy telecom to broadband/5G infrastructure leader.

key_findings.claim: Business segment revenue declined by ~2.8% due to legacy wireline weakness.
key_findings.impact: Need for continued cost transformation and portfolio rationalization.
